zh.lifeSummary: 當Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans於1255年出生在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧時，他的父親Walram II von Nassau35歲，母親Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen23歲。他和Imagina von Isenburg Limburg至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1298年7月2日在德國海藍-普法爾茲堂納斯波可萊斯格利海姆享年43歲，埋葬在德國海藍-普法爾茲斯培也斯培也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans于1255年出生在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧时，他的父亲Walram II von Nassau35岁，母亲Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen23岁。他和Imagina von Isenburg Limburg至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1298年7月2日在德国海藍-普法爾茲堂納斯波可萊斯格利海姆享年43岁，埋葬在德国海藍-普法爾茲斯培也斯培也。

nameMeanings.name: Count
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earl
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English e(o)rl ‘earl’, a traditional English title of nobility equivalent in rank to French and Norman Count .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Nassau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Nassau, formerly the seat of an independent duchy. The placename derives from Old High German naz ‘damp, wet’ + ouwa ‘water meadow’.

History: The royal house of Nassau traces its descent from Dudo, Count of Lauenburg, who flourished between 1093 and 1117. His family acquired the county of Nassau in the 12th century. Prince Willem van Oranje-Nassau, otherwise known as William the Silent (1533–84), was the leader of the Dutch revolt against Spain in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Adolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans was born in 1255, in Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, his father, Walram II von Nassau, was 35 and his mother, Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen, was 23. He had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Imagina von Isenburg Limburg. He died on 2 July 1298, in Göllheim, Donnersbergkreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 43, and was buried in Speyer, Speyer, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans est né en 1255, à Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Walram II von Nassau, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Imagina von Isenburg Limburg. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1298, à Göllheim, Donnersbergkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Speyer, Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne.

de.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans 1255 in Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walram II von Nassau 35 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen 23. Er hatte mit Imagina von Isenburg Limburg mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Juli 1298 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Göllheim, Donnersbergkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Speyer, Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans è nato il nel 1255 nel Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Walram II von Nassau, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Imagina von Isenburg Limburg. Morì il 2 luglio 1298, nel Göllheim, Donnersbergkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Speyer, Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romansが1255年にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウで生まれた時，父Walram II von Nassauは35歳，母Adelheid von Katzenelnbogenは23歳であった。彼はImagina von Isenburg Limburgとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1298年7月2日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズドネルスバーグクレイスグoルヘイムで43歳で死去し，ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズスペヤースペヤーにて埋葬された。

ko.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소
ko.lifeSummary: Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans(이)가 1255년 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walram II von Nassau(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Imagina von Isenburg Limburg(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1298년 7월 2일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 도너스버그크레이스 그o하임에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 스피어 스피어에 묻혔다.

pt.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans nasceu em 1255, em Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Walram II von Nassau, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Imagina von Isenburg Limburg. Ele faleceu em 2 de julho de 1298, em Göllheim, Donnersbergkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Speyer, Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha.

ro.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Germania

ru.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans родился в 1255 г. в местности хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Walram II von Nassau было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen, 23. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Imagina von Isenburg Limburg. Он умер 2 июля 1298 г. в местности гoллхим, доннирсбиргкрис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности спиир, спиир, раинланд-пфалз, Германия.

es.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans nació en 1255, en Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Walram II von Nassau, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Imagina von Isenburg Limburg. Murió el 2 de julio de 1298, en Göllheim, Donnersbergkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Speyer, Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania.
